name: mourner-bmad-workflow-codex
description: Codex plugin wrapper for official BMAD plus personal add-on skills.

interface.shortDescription: Official BMAD plus Mourner's personal add-on for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Installs official BMAD, applies Mourner's personal customizations, and exposes local Codex plugin packaging for existing-project workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use official BMAD and the personal add-on for this repository.
Bootstrap project context for this existing codebase.
Use the personal BMAD wrapper to plan or review this change.
